arts.ttl: 'Bite him in his neck' - Some Leeds United players will not like Daniel Farke's decision - Leeds Live
arts.sum: “In general, it's one of the most difficult parts of your job because, I mentioned several times, each and every player wants to play each and every second on the pitch and you're just allowed to start 11 players,” he said. After 197 league minutes last season and one this term, Gelhardt is probably one of the players Farke believes want to bite him in the neck.

arts.ttl: Coventry City dealt injury hammer blow ahead of Leeds United with key man ruled out for months
arts.sum: Influential midfielder Jamie Allen faces two to three months on the sidelines after suffering a serious knee problem in their loss to Swansea City last time out. Coventry City have received mixed news on the injury front ahead of tomorrow's trip to Leeds United.

arts.ttl: Coventry City injury 'blow' as Jamie Allen ruled out for two to three months
arts.sum: Coventry City midfielder Jamie Allen has been confirmed as having suffered a serious knee injury against Swansea which will keep him out of action for the next two to three months. “Last week against Swansea I think we needed to try to get back into the game after going two goals down pretty quickly, and I was trying to make more attacking changes to the game which meant that I decided not to bring him on.

arts.ttl: New Leeds United signing proving “less than ideal” already after Daniel Farke comments
arts.sum: Leeds United winger Manor Solomon has played two times for the club and looked good in those outings, but is also now missing his second successive game through injury. After missing the trip to Cardiff City with a back injury, the worry for Leeds is that injury concerns are now ringing true.

arts.ttl: Archie Gray delivers Ange Postecoglou verdict as ex-Leeds United star impresses for Tottenham
arts.sum: Postecoglou appears to be playing a crucial role in developing the confidence in his younger players, a sentiment echoed by England Under-21 international Gray, who stated: "I'm really grateful to have the manager we've got. Reflecting on the match and his European debut, Gray shared with TNT Sports: "Yeah obviously a proud moment for me and my family.

arts.ttl: 49ers Enterprises told to expect 'short-term pain' amid Leeds United's Elland Road expansion plans
arts.sum: Speaking on the latest episode of The Price of Football podcast, Maguire said: “If you want to be at the top table you’ve got to have at least a 50,000, and this appears to be the decision which has been made by 49ers investment and Red Bull that Elland Road, which is a fierce and ferocious stadium and it creates an absolutely cracking atmosphere, and credit Leeds United fans for doing that. The development and expansion of Elland Road will offer up fresh revenue streams for Leeds United but see them go through “short-term pain”.

arts.ttl: “Outstanding” Archie Gray right-back verdict emerges on European debut following Leeds United exit
arts.sum: Leeds United sold Archie Gray to Tottenham at the start of July, and while the midfielder has been forced to remain at right-back in his early days in North London, he’s impressing along the way. Archie Gray makes Europa League debut at right-back against Qarabag

arts.ttl: Leeds United and Sheffield United fired transfer warning over League One star
arts.sum: Birmingham reportedly turned down bids for Paik, who has made 27 appearances for the Blues to date since signing on a free transfer back in January. It took Leeds United until the day of the summer transfer window to complete the signing of Ao Tanaka.

arts.ttl: Leeds United line-up vs Coventry with Struijk and Firpo calls plus Tanaka claim
arts.sum: Max Wober’s increasingly serious knee injury makes it harder to leave Struijk out, but we know Ethan Ampadu and Joe Rodon can put together one of the best defensive partnerships in this division. Risks should not be taken with Leeds United players in the seventh game of a 46-match season, especially when they have similar injuries in their past.

arts.ttl: Leeds United wildcard waiting in the wings if injury fears are realised vs Coventry
arts.sum: Daniel Farke promoted James Debayo to the senior squad ahead of pre-season and he has been training with the first team ever since. Assumptions about Ethan Ampadu replacing Pascal Struijk in defence on Saturday could be misplaced, with another Leeds United teenager waiting in the wings for a debut.
